title: Forgetting to wrap the clock
problem: It's 10 o'clock. What hour shows on a 12-hour clock 5 hours later? (we want 3).

trace.checkpoint_prompt: It's 10 o'clock. After `clock = start + 5` runs, what will clock show?

trace.note: clock = 10 + 5 = 15. There's no 15 on a 12-hour clock — the code never wrapped the value back around to 3.
